strategy: Attack with Life; she resists Death 80% and takes boosted Life damage. Never hit into her Death resist.
Do not overwrite her round-1 Deadzone global. She recasts it, so leave it and plan to out-damage rather than out-heal.
Blade and hit in the same round, or Aegis your blade. Any helpful Charm or Aura makes her Starfall the recipient and strip the buff.
Do not heal (she answers with a Pathogen DoT) and do not cast harmful Auras on her (she answers with Monk of Mourning on the caster).
Beat her around round 4. Every fourth round she casts Scarecrow, an AoE drain that heals her. AoE the Storm Shark down with her.
cheatNotes: Round 1 she puts up a +35% Deadzone global that boosts Death and cuts healing. Plan to out-damage, not out-heal.
She recasts Deadzone if you replace it with your own global, so do not bother overwriting it.
Any helpful Charm or Aura makes her Starfall the recipient (or the aura caster), stripping the buff. Blade and hit the same round, or Aegis the blade.
Casting a harmful Aura on Lamia makes her hit the caster with Monk of Mourning (Tier 2b).
Any heal gets the recipient a Pathogen DoT (or the caster on an all-allies heal). Avoid healing.
At the start of the fourth round and every fourth round after, she casts Scarecrow, an AoE drain that heals her. Kill her before it swings the fight.
